findings.description: The source code comment `// FailureLogFormatterの拡張クラスにインナークラスとして定義している。` is omitted. The knowledge file presents CustomDataItem and CustomDataFailureLogFormatter as two independent code blocks, losing the guidance that CustomDataItem is intended to be defined as a private static inner class of the FailureLogFormatter extension. The source's second code block explicitly shows `private static final class CustomDataItem extends DataItem { // 省略。 }` nested inside `CustomDataFailureLogFormatter`, but the knowledge file's two code blocks do not convey this structural relationship.
findings.source_evidence: // FailureLogFormatterの拡張クラスにインナークラスとして定義している。 (first code block comment) and private static final class CustomDataItem extends DataItem { // 省略。 } shown nested inside CustomDataFailureLogFormatter (second code block)

findings.description: The `@SuppressWarnings("unchecked")` annotation on the `get(FailureLogContext context)` method is omitted from the code example.

findings.location: s1 — 障害解析ログの出力例
findings.description: The stack trace portion of the output example is omitted. The source includes `Stack Trace Information :` followed by exception class, message, and stack frames. While this does not demonstrate masking behavior, it is part of the official output example showing the complete log format.
